titleStmt.title: SII 7.187: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 187. (A.R. No. 25 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN WARG No. 6 IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbha
(ṁ)mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.] svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya sakavaruśa 1342 neya
krōdhisaṁvvatsarada puśyasu 5 Ā śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratā
pa dēvarāyamahārāyara sāṁbrājyōdaya kāladalū [Ā]vara nirūpa
diṁ nāgaṁṇaOḍeyarū maṁgalūra śrī rājyavanū pratipālisutti¨rdda kālada
lli [A]¨rththapurada cakrapāṇi śrīgōpināthadēvara sannidhiyalū śrīpurada dēvara A
grahāra hariharada vrittimaṁta bhāradvājagōtrada mārapadēvaśiṣyagaḷa makka
ḷu maṁgalūru karaṇika hariyarasagaḷu dha(ṁ)¨rmmā¨rththakā(ṁ)myamōkṣacatu¨rvvidha puru
śā¨rththaṁgaḷu siddhisalāgi śrīhariprītya¨rththavāgi māḍida dha¨rmmasatrada brāhmaṇabhō
janavanū A siddhibhārati śrīpādaṁgaḷu naḍasuva dha¨rmmakke hari
yaṁṇagaḷa maga dēvarasēnāpati gudari biḷiya seṭṭikāṟa kēsaṁṇṇaseṭṭiyapa
(pa)yavara mādāsatiyara tōṁṭa bhūmiya vivara . mā tiyarū ta(ṁ)mma brahmā
dāyada mūlada ṭhāU hiriyabhaḷūralū madilaveṁba kṣētravanū krayavanū ko
ṭṭarāgi Ā bhūmiya catussīmeya vivara . mūḍalu bhīmikēśvaradēvarige naṭṭakallu
huṇiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁka tī¨rthamaṭha baḍagalu paḍuvalu hādiyiṁda
mūḍalu baḍagalu siṁgēriya śrīpādaṁgaḷa bhūmiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi
ṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa bhūmiyanū payipakka mārāttiyaru Āvara maga
ḷōbammakka Ūjaṁti Āḍagi magaḷu raṇapukkaseṭiti yiṁtivarugaḷēkastarāgi
krayava koṭṭarāgi Ā bhūmige tatkālōcida krayadravya Oṁdutāra paḷi
ya dīpa yivakke mārāḷittiyara kaiyyalu koṭṭu dhārāmūḷige hiraṁ
ṇyavanū hāyikki sahiraṇyōdakadānadhārāpū¨rvvakadi dhāreya neṟa
sikoṁḍu naṭṭa śilāśāsana . yī śāsanastadoḷaguḷḷa bhūmiya kere mara phala kaṇi
kadiru kkilu nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāśāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi siddha sādhya
Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmya yivellaU chatrada maṭhakke saluvaU .
yī bhūmige Ārasiṁge teṟu sidhāya Osage du
ppaṇe Ānāya yivellaU pū¨rvva toḍagi yillavāgi yidanū sa¨rvvamānya
navarige pū¨rvva toḍagi hoṁdu mariyāde yillavāgi
yiṁtī sa¨rvvamāṁnyada bhūmiyanū krayavanū koṁḍu baṁda
nakara śrīgōpināthadēvara saṁnidhiyalū māḍida brāhmaṇa bhōjana
ḍadu bahaṁtāgi naṭṭa śāśanada kallū
ru Avarugaḷu vāraṇāśiya
kapile sahasravēda viṣṇugaḷa pūjisida
napālanayō¨rmmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsva¨rgga
mavāpnōti pālanāt Acyu
śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
